samples.author: Buy Maryland
samples.text: The staff was fantastic—attentive, professional, and made sure everything ran smoothly from start to finish. Our team couldn’t stop raving about the atmosphere and how unique the experience was. We truly enjoyed the hotel's beautiful location, scenery and views before a lovely sunset. Drinks were 10/10. We are looking forward to visiting their rooftop this summer.

samples.author: Di'Andra T
samples.text: Fantastic job by the entire Vessel team. Our company held our Staff Holiday Party and Chris and Mike were phenomenal. This team demonstrated hospitality at its finest from start to finish. We will be back next year. Thank you Roost/Vessel team!

samples.author: latrice turner
samples.text: Went to Vessel for a friend's event, and the atmosphere and service were amazing.  The food was ok, but the vibe and DJ were amazing.  I recommend visiting as a chill or meet and greet location.

samples.author: Kristin R.
samples.text: Good and Service is amazing! I went on a Friday and the music was really soulful. Love the atmosphere, it's grown and sexy for sure and Galvin is a great bartender. He educated me on a lot regarding Spirits and made great recommendations

samples.author: Brandon “Belmiro” W.
samples.text: I had the pleasure of attending and event here and boy oh boy we had a time! There was ample parking, the facility was very clean, and the staff was informative and friendly! The cocktails were delicious too & reasonably priced! This spot has definitely been on my "take me back" list. You definitely won't be disappointed!
